header.class: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 h-14 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 z-50

button.class: flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-gray-100 p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100 cursor-pointer dark:hover:bg-gray-700 transition-colors
button.t-att-title: state.isDark ? 'Switch to light mode' : 'Switch to dark mode'

a.class: flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-gray-100 p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 transition-colors
flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-gray-100 p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-700 transition-colors
